scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:automation"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c green,cyan "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:backend"
scripts.start:automation: cd automation && DEBUG_BROWSER=false npm run dev
scripts.dev:mock: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c green,cyan "npm run start:frontend:mock" "npm run start:backend:mock"
scripts.start:frontend:mock: cd frontend && VITE_DEV_MOCK_ADS_COUNT=24 npm run dev
scripts.start:backend:mock: cd backend && DEV_LOGIN_ENABLED=true npm run start:dev
scripts.install:all: npm install && (cd frontend && npm install) && (cd backend && npm install) && (cd extension && npm install)
